raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas tahs Gohwe Pel-
nus irr fanehmis/ tam buhs fa-
wäs Drehbes masgaht/ un ne-
schkihstam buht lihds Wakka-
ram/ tas laid irr weens Likkums
muhſcham/ teem Israëta Behr-
neem/ un teem Sweſchineekeem/
kas juhsu Starpâ/ ka Sweſchi-
neeki miht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas kahdu Mirroxnü / jeb
kahdu mirruschu zilwezigu Mee-
fu aiskarr/ tam buhs feptin Dee-
nas nefchkihstam buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Trefchâ un feptitâ Dee-
na buhs winnam ar to schkih-
stitees/ tad buhs winſch tchkihsts:
bet ja winſch trefcha un feptitâ
Deenâ ne schkihstifees/ tad winſch
ne buhs schkihsts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiss/ kas kahdn Mirro-
nü weenu mirruschu zilwezigu
Meeſu/kas nomirris irr/ aiskarr/
un ne schkihstifees / tas fagahna
ta KUNGA Dshwokli/ un tah-
da Dwehfele taps isdeldeta no
Israëta/ tapehz ka tas Glazzina-
schanas-Uhdens us to ne irr flaz-
zinahts / winſch irr nefchkihsts/
kamehr winſch no ta ne tohp
schkihstihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schi irr ta Bauſtiba/ kad
weens Zilweks kahdâ Dshwokli
mirſt/ wiﬀam/ kas tai Dshwo-
kli nahk/ un wiﬀam / kas tamni
Dshwokli irr/ buhs feptin Dee-
nas nefchkihstam buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiﬀi atwehrti Rihki/
kam nekahds Usgahschamajs wir-
fu irr/ tee irr nefchkihsti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiﬀam / kas us Tih-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "rumu aiskarr kahdu/ kas ar Soh-
binu nokauts irr / jeb kahdu no-
mirruschu/ jeb kahdu Zilwe-
Kaulu / jeb kahdu Kappu/ tam
buhs feptin Deenas nefchkih-
stan buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nu preekſch ween-
neſchkihstu buhs winneem t
fadedsinata Grehku-Uppura Pe-
nus xeint/un us to tekkoschu Uli-
deni kahdâ Traukâ leet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un weenam fschkihsta-
Wihran buhs Jhsapu xeint/ u-
to Uhdeni eemehrzeht/ un to Te-
ti apflazziht/ un wiﬀus Rihkue-
un wiﬀas Dwehfeles / kas ti-
irr bijuschas: Un to/ kas aiskar-
ris irr kahdu Kaulu / jeb kah-
nokautu/ jeb kahdu nomirruschu-
jeb kahdu Kappu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tam Schkihstam bu-
to Neschkihstu trefchâ Deenâ/ u-
feptitâ Deenâ aptlazziht/ un fe-
titâ Deenâ buhs winnam
schkihstiht / un tam buhs faw-
Drehbes masgaht / nn ar Uhd-
pehrtees/ tad buhs winſch Wa-
kara schkihsts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kursch nefchkih-
buhs/ un ne schkihstifees/schi pa-
Dwehfele taps isdeldeta no ta-
Draudses Widdus / jo ta irr
KUNGA swehtuWeetu apgahr-
just / tas Glazzinaschanas-li-
dens ne irr us to flazzihts/ tas i-
nefchkihsts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schis nu laid juns
weens Likkums muhſcham/un k-
tahs Glazzinaschanas- Uhd-
flakka/ tam buhs fawas Dreht-
"
    }
